SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template.impl

Class JoinedEntityHelper

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.template.impl.JoinedEntityHelper
public final class JoinedEntityHelper extends Object
Utility for handling multi-table DML operations for joined sealed entity types (Joined Table inheritance).

In joined table inheritance, the base table stores common fields and a discriminator, while each permitted subclass has its own extension table with subtype-specific fields. DML operations must target multiple tables:

  • INSERT: insert into the base table first (to get the generated PK), then into the extension table.
  • UPDATE: update the base table and extension table separately.
  • DELETE: delete from the extension table first (FK constraint), then from the base table.

DML operations use the template engine with partition-aware models. The sealed model (base table) has extension-specific columns marked as non-insertable/non-updatable, so INSERT/UPDATE via the sealed model automatically touches only base fields and the discriminator. The concrete subtype model (extension table) has base non-PK fields marked as non-insertable/non-updatable and PK generation set to NONE, so INSERT/UPDATE via the concrete model touches only PK and extension fields.

Since:
1.9

  • Method Details

    • insert

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void insert(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull E entity)
      Inserts a joined entity into both the base and extension tables.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entity - the entity to insert.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the insert fails.

    • insertAndFetchId

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> ID insertAndFetchId(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull E entity)
      Inserts a joined entity and returns the generated primary key.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entity - the entity to insert.
      Returns:
      the generated primary key.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the insert fails.

    • update

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void update(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull E entity)
      Updates a joined entity in both the base and extension tables.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entity - the entity to update.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the update fails.

    • delete

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void delete(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull E entity)
      Deletes a joined entity from both the extension and base tables.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entity - the entity to delete.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the delete fails.

    • deleteById

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void deleteById(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull ID id)
      Deletes a joined entity by primary key from all extension and base tables.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      id - the primary key of the entity to delete.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the delete fails.

    • insertBatch

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> List<ID> insertBatch(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull List<E> entities)
      Inserts a batch of joined entities into both the base and extension tables.

      Phase 1 inserts all entities into the base table (sealed type), collecting generated keys if applicable. Phase 2 partitions entities by concrete subtype and inserts into the corresponding extension tables.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entities - the entities to insert (already validated and transformed by callbacks).
      Returns:
      the list of generated (or provided) primary keys, one per entity.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the insert fails.
      Since:
      1.9

    • insertExtensionTables

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void insertExtensionTables(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull List<E> entities, @Nonnull List<ID> ids)
      Inserts extension table rows for a batch of joined entities. This method performs Phase 2 of the joined entity batch insert: it partitions the entities by concrete subtype and inserts into the corresponding extension tables.

      This method is intended for use by dialect-specific implementations that need to perform the base table insert (Phase 1) using a different mechanism (e.g., SQL Server's OUTPUT INSERTED clause) while reusing the standard extension table insert logic.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entities - the entities to insert (already validated and transformed by callbacks).
      ids - the primary keys for the entities, in the same order as the entities list.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the insert fails.
      Since:
      1.9

    • updateBatch

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void updateBatch(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull List<E> entities)
      Updates a batch of joined entities in both the base and extension tables.

      Phase 1 updates all entities in the base table (sealed type). Phase 2 partitions entities by concrete subtype and updates the corresponding extension tables (only for subtypes with extension fields).

      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entities - the entities to update (already validated and transformed by callbacks).
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the update fails.
      Since:
      1.9

    • deleteBatch

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void deleteBatch(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull List<E> entities)
      Deletes a batch of joined entities from both extension and base tables.

      Phase 1 deletes from extension tables first (FK constraints), partitioned by concrete subtype. Phase 2 deletes all entities from the base table.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      entities - the entities to delete (already validated).
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the delete fails.
      Since:
      1.9

    • deleteBatchByRef

      public static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID> void deleteBatchByRef(@Nonnull QueryTemplate queryTemplate, @Nonnull Model<E,ID> model, @Nonnull List<Ref<E>> refs)
      Deletes a batch of joined entities by reference from all extension and base tables.

      When the concrete type is unknown, attempts DELETE from all extension tables for all IDs (at most one will match per entity), then deletes from the base table.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the entity type (sealed interface).
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      queryTemplate - the query template for executing SQL.
      model - the model describing the sealed entity.
      refs - the entity references to delete.
      Throws:
      PersistenceException - if the delete fails.
      Since:
      1.9
